productDisplayName: Murcia Women With Stitch Black Bag
description: CompositionBlack pure leather handbag with a ridged body, side to side zipper , sturdy strap grips and dedicated pocket to carry cosmeticsbag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Use a mild leather cleanerThis bag from murcia is perfect for women who dislike carrying big bags to work. The ridged look lends it a sense of oomph, hile the side to side zippers ensure ample space to stack away your essentials. A separate chamber to carry your essential cosmetics like kohl pencil, lip gloss, a container of foundation, tissues and your quintessential mobile phone make it an extremely organized bag to carry. The sturdy strap grips ensure durability. This bag also comes in brown, white and beige.
